page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.48xlarge is a general-purpose instance type powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs, utilizing AMD EPYC 9T24 processors running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated physical execution resources per vCPU. It is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for data persistence. It lacks integrated GPU hardware accelerators. For network connectivity, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput communication for distributed systems and multi-node clusters.

Given its high density of dedicated physical cores and balanced memory-to-core ratio, the ecs.g8a.48xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for large-scale enterprise workloads that require predictable CPU performance without hyperthreading overhead. The lack of local storage and GPUs positions this instance for compute-heavy general-purpose applications, large-scale web serving, enterprise application servers, and distributed microservices that rely on network-attached storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.48xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs powered by AMD EPYC 9T24 processors running at 2.7 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, it provides dedicated execution resources alongside 768.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor, lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This hardware profile is optimized for large-scale enterprise workloads, web serving, and distributed applications requiring high-throughput networking and predictable, non-hyperthreaded CPU performance.
